category_sources: source_facts.description says Add Replay Gain volume tags to Ogg Vorbis files; official sjeng.org VorbisGain page describes correcting Ogg Vorbis loudness using ReplayGain.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vorbisgain; official sjeng.org page is titled VorbisGain.
docs_sources: Official sjeng.org VorbisGain page is the project homepage and includes description, usage context, downloads, and source+documentation links.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official sjeng.org page provides source tarball downloads but no official source-control repository URL was found.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official sjeng.org page identify Ogg Vorbis ReplayGain volume tagging by a command-line utility.
